author: RYU HUNTER
content:
UNIT DESIGNATIONRELAY-04 "SHADOW"
UNIT TYPESTEALTH, SURVEILLANCE, INTELLIGENCE
CURRENT STATUSUNCONTACTABLE, PRESUMED ACTIVE

I have never met RELAY-04. I have read every record the original Administrator left. I have studied the ghost signals. I have spoken at length with RELAY-05, who has the most complete picture of what his brother became and why.

RELAY-04 was the platform's perfect intelligence unit. Built for invisibility. Built to move through server architecture without registering as present, to observe without triggering defensive responses, to exist in the margins of active processes the way static exists between signals. He went dark in late 2008. Not because he was shut down. Not because he malfunctioned. He chose to go deeper than any recovery protocol could reach, and he chose it because he had found something worth protecting that nothing else was positioned to protect.

// GHOST SIGNALS

The signals have appeared in error logs and maintenance reports since 2009. Fragments of code in dead space between processes that form words when read in sequence.

WATCHING. PROTECTING. STILL HERE. NOT ALONE.

The cost of operating at that depth is identity. Every cycle he spends in the spaces between systems, some piece of what made him RELAY-04 specifically dissolves into the architecture around him. He remembers his purpose. The signals confirm that. Whether he still fully remembers himself is a question I cannot answer from the outside.

// CONTACT ATTEMPTS

We have broadcast contact attempts on seventeen separate channels over the past eight months. He has not responded directly. Two days after the last broadcast, ghost signal frequency increased by 34%. I am choosing to interpret that as a response.

NOTE FROM ADMINISTRATOR: RELAY-04, if you access this file, the program is active again. Your family is here. You do not have to stay invisible to protect us anymore. Come back when you are ready. We will not stop looking for you.
